what_you_did: Corrected 7 HE bills on test.hamzahotel.com (Odoo 19.0+e). PM swaps on pos.payment 7666 (bill7: HE UPI→Cash Captain) and 7657 (bill6 existing refund: Comp→Cash). Created 5 refund pos.orders (bills 1-5) in open sessions 268 (Cash Counter, config 5) + 269 (Captain, config 6). Net: -₹1,489.36 phantom revenue removed; cash drawer ledger now reconciles to physical reality; HE UPI bank -₹418.01, HE Cash Captain +₹293.01, HE Cash Counter -₹1,364.36, HE Complimentary +₹305.09 (cleared phantom comp).
learned: FACT: Odoo 19 pos.order in state=paid REJECTS state writes to draft/cancel — must operate forward (refund order) not backward (cancel original). FACT: pos.payment.write({payment_method_id}) is canonical Odoo-19-safe for PM swap on paid orders in an open session — propagates through computed chain correctly. FACT: raw pos.order.create() bypasses sync_from_ui — leaves amount_paid=0 (stored field) requiring explicit write. FACT: D1 pos_orders_mirror is NCH-only (sales_sync_state seeds are nch_*), HE corrections need no D1 invalidation. FACT: HE session 268 (Cash Counter) + 269 (Captain) have been open since 2026-05-20 — sessions in HE POS are long-lived, not daily-closed.

what_you_did: Applied STRUCTURAL-ORIGINAL date model on bills 3/4/5 (refunds 8058/8059/8054 + payments 8095/8096/8092). date_order and payment_date both set to original+1min. Bill3 -> 2026-05-23 15:40:16. Bill4 -> 2026-05-22 12:35:01. Bill5 -> 2026-05-21 19:47:10. Bills 1/2 stayed today (originals were also today). Bills 6/7 untouched.
learned: FACT: pos.order.date_order is writable on state=paid orders in open sessions (Odoo 19) via direct write. FACT: pos.payment.payment_date is independently writable; must be synced with order date_order to keep journal-day consistent.
